---
title: "Moving the Gates"
format: html
---

Alright, let's try to move the gates.

```{r}
library(flowWorkspace)
library(ggcyto)
library(Luciernaga)
```

```{r}
SFC_GatingSet <- load_gs("data/BeadsGS.gs")
```

```{r}
plot(SFC_GatingSet)
```

```{r}
Singlets <- gs_pop_get_gate(SFC_GatingSet, "singlets")

Hmm <- Singlets$`DTR_2023_ILT_00-Reference Group-4BeadsUnstained (Beads).1237095.fcs`
Hmm@boundaries
Hmm@parameters
Hmm@filterId

str(Singlets)
```
